AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.enterpriseSecurityGroupId: The enterprise security group ID to which new security group rules are authorized.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules: Enterprise security group rules to be authorized.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.direction: Inbound/outbound direction, value: ingress or egress.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.ethertype: Network type, value: IPv4 or IPv6.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.portRange: Destination port range. Supports continuous ports (e.g. "1-80") and discrete ports (e.g. "80,7000,8000", separated by commas, up to 15 discrete values). Defaults to 1-65535 if empty.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.sourcePortRange: Source port range. Supports continuous ports (e.g. "1-80") and discrete ports (e.g. "80,7000,8000", separated by commas, up to 15 discrete values). Defaults to 1-65535 if empty.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.protocol: Protocol type: tcp, udp, or icmp.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.sourceIp: Source IP address. Use "all" to match all addresses.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.destIp: Destination IP address. Use "all" to match all addresses.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.localIp: Local IP address. Use "all" to match all addresses.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.action: Allow/deny action, value: allow or deny.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.createdTime: Creation time of the enterprise security group rule.
AuthorizedEnterpriseSecurityGroupRules.rules.updatedTime: Last modification time of the enterprise security group rule.
